evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Direct experience with LangGraph and LangChain, with examples of complex projects or contributions to these frameworks.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: No experience with LangGraph or LangChain, or only familiarity with similar technologies.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Proficiency in Python and AI/ML frameworks
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Strong proficiency in Python, with experience in AI/ML frameworks such as Mistral, Phi, or Llama, and a portfolio of projects demonstrating this expertise.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with Python or AI/ML frameworks.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Experience with real-time system design and WebSockets
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Proven experience in designing and implementing real-time systems using WebSockets, with a focus on low-latency communication and scalability.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: No experience with real-time system design or WebSockets.

evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Experience with containerization using Docker, and a strong understanding of DevOps principles and practices.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with containerization or DevOps.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: API development and SQL optimization skills
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Strong skills in API development and SQL optimization, with experience in designing and implementing efficient database systems.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with API development or SQL optimization.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Education and certifications in Computer Science and Data Science
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: A Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, with a strong preference for candidates pursuing a degree or certification in Data Science.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: No relevant education or certifications in Computer Science or Data Science.

evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Experience with agile development methodologies, such as Scrum or Kanban, and a strong understanding of iterative development principles.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with agile development methodologies.

evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: A history of contributing to open-source projects, with a focus on AI/ML or related technologies.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: No experience with open-source projects or contributions.

evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: Experience with cloud platforms, such as AWS or Google Cloud, and a strong understanding of cloud-based infrastructure and services.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no experience with cloud platforms.

evaluation_criteria.criterion: Strong understanding of software architecture patterns
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_5: A strong understanding of software architecture patterns, with experience in designing and implementing scalable and maintainable systems.
evaluation_criteria.what_counts_as_0: Limited or no understanding of software architecture patterns.

results.name: Sampath
results.content: Sampath Krishna Tekumalla Bengaluru, India 561203 • +91-9490523667 • kittu.tekumalla@gmail.com • linkedin.com/in/sampath2211 • github.com/Sampath-2211 EXECUTIVE SUMMARY Final-year Computer Science student specializing in multi-agent AI workflows with hands-on experience in LangChain, LangGraph, and Docker. Passionate about building scalable LLM-powered applications. Proven ability to translate complex technical workflows into user-friendly, production-ready AI systems through academic research and industry experience at the National Remote Sensing Center, ISRO. EDUCATION Gitam University - CGPA: 8.36​ Sep 2022 - Apr 2026 Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science Engineering ​ Bengaluru, India Coursework : DSA, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, DBMS, Design and Analysis of Algorithms, Artificial Intelligence. Indian Institute of Technology, Madras - CGPA: 7.0​ Sep 2023 - Apr 2027 Bachelor of Science in Data Science ​ Remote Coursework : Mathematics, Probability and Statistics, Computational Intelligence, Python. WORK EXPERIENCE National Remote Sensing Center, ISRO ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ ​ May 2025 - August 2025 AI Engineer Intern, Earth and Climate Sciences Area (ECSA)​ ​ ​ Hyderabad, India Agentic AI For Satellite Geospatial Data Inference Advisors: Rounaq Goenka ●​ Situation : Geospatial data analysis required technical expertise, preventing non-technical users from accessing insights from spatial datasets through complex programming requirements. ●​ Task : To build an AI system enabling users to analyse geospatial data through simple natural language queries without domain expertise. ●​ Action: Integrated LangChain for function-calling capabilities, architected a modular workflow with LangGraph, and deployed Mistral 7B for natural language query processing and response generation, alongside Phi-3 Mini for Python code generation. ●​ Result : Successfully built an AI-powered application that democratizes geospatial analysis, allowing non-technical users to obtain insights through conversational queries. SKILLS P ROGRAMMING L ANGUAGES AND L IBRARIES : C, Python, NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, SQL. S OFTWARE T OOLS ​ : OnlineGDB, Google Colab, Visual Studio Code, Anaconda-Navigator, Docker. AI/ML F RAMEWORKS : LangChain, LangGraph, Ollama PROJECTS Vehicle Data Management System for Autonomous Vehicles ​ Jul, 2024 - Oct, 2024 ●​ Engineered a structured database to store and manage vehicle GPS data, sensor readings, and system status for real-time monitoring. ●​ Structured SQL tables and optimized query structures to enable efficient tracking of vehicle locations, battery levels, and engine performance. ●​ Developed automated logging and data organization processes, reducing manual data retrieval time by 50%. ●​ Implemented SQL views and joins to streamline fleet management, improving reporting accuracy and data-driven decision-making. Real Time Communication with Multiple Clients and Server GitHub ​ Mar, 2024 - Aug, 2024 ●​ Architected and developed a WebSocket-based real-time chat system supporting simultaneous multi-client communication, boosting collaboration efficiency. ●​ Optimized server response times, reducing message latency to under 100ms to ensure smooth, real-time interactions. ●​ Created an interactive and secure HTML-based interface with access control features, enhancing authentication and user security. ●​ Incorporated file-sharing functionality with permission-based access, improving data protection and preventing unauthorized usage. CERTIFICATIONS ●​ Google Cloud - Google Cloud Computing Foundations: Cloud Computing Fundamentals ●​ Google Cloud - Google Cloud Computing Foundations: Infrastructure in Google Cloud ●​ Python Programming - Programming for Everybody (Getting Started with Python) - University of Michigan WORKSHOPS ●​ Participated in the “Code, Create & Conquer – Unleash Your Brilliance” Hackfest , organized by the Department of Computer Science and Engineering at GITAM (Deemed to be University), Bengaluru, from October 13–15, 2023. ●​ As a member of the Software-Defined Vehicles section at MURTHI LAB , I had the opportunity to demonstrate a self-designed autonomous buggy developed in collaboration with VIRYA Technologies and Infosys at the “Connected, Autonomous & Electric Vehicle EXPO 2025” , held at KTPO, Bengaluru, on April 24–25, 2025 — showcasing real-time navigation capabilities to CEOs and industry leaders. EXTRA-CURRICULAR ACTIVITIES ●​ Technical Lead of G-Studio , the official photography club of GITAM University Bangalore, overseeing technical operations and providing support for photography events since August 2024 – May 2025. ●​ Silver Medalist in school-level badminton competition; active player representing college events. ●​ Secured 1st place in a school-wide painting competition while in 5th grade, outperforming senior grades up to 10th.

Sriman Seshadri Iyengar Kodakandla LinkedIn | +91 8712279079 | srimaniyengar6666@gmail.com | Bengaluru, Karnataka, India Objective Passionate about Machine Learning and Deep Learning, eager to explore and develop skills in this domain. Education GITAM University Bengaluru , Computer Science and Engineering 2022 – 2026 CGPA: 9.71 / 10 RGUKT University , Pre-University Course (PUC) 2020 – 2022 Grade: 9.31 / 10 Montessori High School , SSC 2019 – 2020 GPA: 10 / 10 Technical Skills Programming Languages: Python, C Web Technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript Database Systems: SQL Version Control: GitHub Specialized Areas: Machine Learning, Data Science, Deep Learning Internship Machine Learning & Deep Learning Intern , MSRcosmos LLC May 2025 – June 2025 • Worked on extracting floorplans from blob-linked PDF files using LLM-based segregation; integrated Google AI Studio models via API. • Used YOLOv9 to classify and detect architectural elements like rooms, doors, windows, and furniture from AutoCAD images. • Applied color coding, centroid extraction, and dimension labeling for detailed visualization and precise material estimation. Projects Stock Forecasting and News Summarization App using ML • Developed an interactive Gradio-based dashboard to analyze Nifty 50 stocks using real-time data, technical indicators, and stock-specific news sentiment. • Integrated Google Gemini API to summarize financial news from RSS feeds and display AI-powered insights. • Trained a Random Forest model to predict 3-month stock returns using PE ratio, ROE, volatility, and visualized top stock picks with sector-based pie charts.
